name: 47 - Wf Telegram Inbound Polling getUpdates TEST ONLY - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
READY IMPORT — active=false. Schedule Trigger exists disabled/test-only. No Telegram Trigger. No public webhook. active:false until explicit runtime gate.

Prereq: n8n Data Table wf47_polling_state_test with rows:
  last_update_id=0, last_handled_update_id=0, handled_keys_json={}

Human steps ONLY:
1) Delete/avoid duplicate old workflow 47 before import
2) Import this template once
3) Set node: replace **CONFIGURE_ALLOWED_CHAT_ID_IN_N8N_UI**
4) HTTP node: token URL in n8n UI only
5) Manual Trigger twice to validate duplicate block

Persistence: Data Table (not staticData). TEST ONLY table wf47_polling_state_test.
